title: ulmus nitens var. stricta
intro: Ulmus nitens var. stricta, also known as the narrow-leaved camphor-leaved elm, is a plant species within the elm family (Ulmaceae) that is characterized by its narrow, lance-shaped leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ulmus nitens var. stricta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, with herbal preparations often involving the bark, leaves, or roots being used for medicinal purposes.
